description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a streamlined, angular fuselage and a wide, straight wingspan featuring subtle upward winglets at the tips. The body is predominantly black with striking cyan or teal accents along the wings, fuselage, and engine housings, giving it a high-tech appearance. The cockpit is centrally located at the front, enclosed with a clear canopy, and appears to be designed for a single pilot. The airplane has twin vertical stabilizers at the rear, connected by a horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration. The engines are mounted above the wings, integrated into the main body, and their design suggests an electric or ducted fan propulsion system. No visible landing gear is present, indicating it may have retractable or non-traditional gear suited for smooth surfaces.
description: A futuristic black and cyan airplane with a wide, straight wingspan, twin vertical stabilizers, and a central enclosed cockpit. The design is streamlined with integrated engines and high-tech visual accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide wingspan, central cockpit, and upward-angled winglets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin, angular fuselage, engine placement above the wings, and the H-tail configuration.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, horizontal stabilizer, and the symmetry of the wings and tail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the streamlined body, engine integration, and the overall aerodynamic profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and upward-angled winglets; slight dihedral angle for stability.
attribute_engine_type: Twin electric ducted fans integrated above the wings near the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers connected by a horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; possible retractable or flush-mounted configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy integrated into the fuselage.
